subparts.text: Sources of Data acquisition for creation of GIS based maps

questions.question_text: What is meant by a Global Positioning System? Briefly discuss the various components and benefits of Global Positioning System.
How can GIS support decision making for various planning applications? Briefly discuss Urban Information systems for various activity sectors.
What are the different pre-conditions for using Planning Information Systems and why is it important? Explain with examples.
What are the various data representation techniques in GIS? Discuss how GIS can be used as a modelling tool for data analysis.
What is Geospatial data and Temporal data? Discuss how they can be used to create Base maps and Thematic maps.
What is meant by Topography creation using GIS? Briefly discuss the process and how it can be useful for urban planning with the help of an example.
What is meant by Digital change detection? Briefly discuss the process and how it is useful for planners.
What is the role of GIS in Urban and Regional planning? Discuss with the help of suitable examples.
